title: Virtual CFO Services Chennai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Virtual CFO services in Chennai. MIS reporting, cash flow management, fundraising support, compliance oversight. Expert CA. Call +91-99622 60333.
bodyText:
Looking for Virtual CFO services in Chennai? Virtual Auditor provides comprehensive Virtual CFO services in Chennai, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA), IBBI Registered Valuer, and Associate Company Secretary (ACS). Get C-suite financial leadership without the cost of a full-time CFO.

What is Virtual CFO Services Chennai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Monthly MIS reporting — P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow Statement with variance analysis and KPI tracking. Cash flow forecasting and working capital management. Fundraising support — investor pitch preparation, financial model building, due diligence data room management. Budgeting and financial planning — annual budgets, quarterly reviews, scenario analysis. Compliance oversight — tax planning, statutory audit coordination, ROC filings, and regulatory compliance monitoring. Board presentation preparation with financial insights and strategic recommendations. Investor and lender relationship management — periodic reporting, covenant compliance, and financial communication.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor as Your Virtual CFO in Chennai
  A full-time CFO costs Rs 30-50 lakhs annually. Virtual Auditor's Virtual CFO service delivers the same strategic financial leadership at a fraction of the cost — ideal for startups, SMEs, and growing businesses that need CFO-level expertise but not a full-time hire. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, IBBI RV) brings triple qualification — financial expertise, corporate governance, and valuation skills — making our Virtual CFO service uniquely comprehensive. Our Spencer Plaza office in Chennai provides regular in-person reviews. We serve startups from seed to Series B, manufacturing companies, service businesses, and family enterprises.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Financial health assessment — review existing books, systems, and reporting gaps. Step 2: Customised MIS framework design based on your business model and KPIs. Step 3: Monthly financial close and MIS delivery by 10th of each month. Step 4: Quarterly strategy reviews with management — performance analysis, forecasting, tax planning. Step 5: Ad-hoc support for fundraising, M&A, regulatory issues, and board meetings. Step 6: Annual financial planning and budget preparation.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need a Virtual CFO in Chennai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-99622 60333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: G-131, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002
  Flexible monthly packages starting from Rs 25,000/month.

faqs.q: What is a Virtual CFO and how is it different from an accountant?
faqs.a: A Virtual CFO provides strategic financial leadership — fundraising, cash flow management, financial planning, investor reporting — while an accountant handles bookkeeping and compliance. Virtual CFO is forward-looking (planning and strategy), while accounting is backward-looking (recording transactions).

faqs.q: How much does Virtual CFO service cost in Chennai?
faqs.a: Monthly packages start from Rs 25,000/month for early-stage companies. Pricing scales with complexity — transaction volume, fundraising activity, compliance requirements, and reporting frequency. Contact +91-99622 60333 for a customised proposal.

faqs.q: Can a Virtual CFO help with fundraising?
faqs.a: Yes. Fundraising support is a core Virtual CFO deliverable — financial model building, valuation analysis, investor deck review, due diligence data room preparation, and investor communication during the fundraising process.
